title: Bee Sting Treatment for Outdoor Workers: 7 Teas
description: Arnica montana teas have been used for centuries to help with bee stings due to its anti-inflammatory and antihistamine properties. The tea contains constituents like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which help to reduce swelling, itching, and pain caused by the sting. When you experience a bee sting, it's essential to remove the stinger immediately, wash the area with soap and water, and apply a cold compress to reduce swelling.
